cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the question carefully. The question is asking what is important for us to be a happy person according to the article. The options are A to D. The article lists seven mistakes to avoid to become happier. Let me go through each point again to see which one is relevant to the options given. Point 1: Placing too much emphasis on fulfillment. It mentions that putting pressure on oneself to be happy leads to more loneliness. So this is a mistake to avoid. But the options don't directly address this. Point 2: Keeping it all in. Not expressing emotions can hurt mental and physical health. The options don't mention this either. Point 3: Looking at your smartphone all the time.
